Package gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.repository

package gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.repository
This package defines the interfaces that must be supported by a repository used by the services in the service package.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgateway.hub
    This package houses the SOAP Controllers used by IZ Gateway for sending and receiving SOAP Messages.
    gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    IAccessControlRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IAccessControl>
    The IAccessControlRepository interface supports access to access control information.
    IAccessGroupRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IAccessGroup>
    Repository interface for managing IAccessGroup entities.
    IAllowedUserRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IAllowedUser>
    Repository interface for managing IAllowedUser entities.
    ICertificateStatusRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.ICertificateStatus>
    A repository tracking certificate status information.
    IDenyListRecordRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDenyListRecord>
    Repository interface for managing IDenyListRecord entities.
    IDestinationRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination>
    The necessary interface for implementing a DestinationRepository
    IFileTypeRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IFileType>
    Repository interface for managing IFileType entities.
    IJurisdictionRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IJurisdiction>
    The interface needed by JurisdictionService to access Jurisdiction information.
    IMessageHeaderRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IMessageHeader>
    The IMessageHeaderRepository interface supports access to message header records
    IOrganizationRecordRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IOrganizationRecord>
    Repository interface for managing IOrganizationRecord entities.
    RepositoryFactory
    Repository Factory is used to support replacable repositories.
